headline: Visa Expands B2B Automation And Fan Commerce To Support Long Term Story
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) has integrated Visa Accounts Receivable Manager into its Commercial Solutions Hub, aiming to streamline virtual card adoption and automate payments and reconciliation for issuers and suppliers. Visa also announced a collaboration with Men in Blazers Media Network to create soccer focused City Guides that connect local small businesses with fans during major sporting events. Visa, trading at about $322.77, has seen its share price decline 6.8% year to date and 10.9% over the...
